name: property managers processing 5–15 lease invoices/month tool
description: For property managers processing 5–15 lease invoices/month, late or missing invoices cause cash flow gaps. We provide timely alerts instead of manual tracking of lease payments and invoices.
problem_solved: Late or missing lease invoices can lead to cash flow gaps and tenant dissatisfaction.
features: Monthly summary report of lease payments

locked_fields.primary_problem: Late or missing lease invoices can lead to cash flow gaps and tenant dissatisfaction.
